_publications._publicationTitle: Overcoming BET Inhibitor Resistance in Malignant Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumors.

_contextSnippet: we observed hyper-sensitivity to JQ1 in Brd4-knockout MPNST cells...MPNST cells maintaining BRD4 expression (e.g. c1, c2, c3), showed intermediate levels of cell death with JQ1, while cells with BRD4 knockout (e.g. c4) displayed near-maximal cell death
details: BRD4-knockout cells showed hyper-sensitivity to JQ1 with near-maximal cell death, while BRD4-expressing cells showed intermediate levels of cell death
